name: strata-text
description: Publish one article at three author-approved levels of detail. Let the reader pinch or tap to choose the depth.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/strata.esm.js && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=dist/strata.min.js && esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/strata.global.js

author: Brian Doll
